chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Criminal Bail Application 24 of 2026 Brahim vs. The State For the Applicant: Mr. Muhammad Fayyaz Rind, Advocate Mr. Brahim, Applicant Date of hearing: 12.02.2026 Date of announcement: 12.02.2026 ORDER Agha Faisal, J. Urgency granted. Granted subject to all just exceptions The applicant seeks protective bail, in respect of F.I.R. No.ASO-439/2023-HQ, registered on 28.10.2023 before Anti-smuggling Organization (HQ), NMB Wharf, Karachi, pertaining to offence/s under Section/s 6, 7 and 8 of the Control of Narcotics Substances Act, 1997, punishable under section 9 Sr. (d) ibid as amended dated 5th September 2022 read with Section 2(s), 16, 156, 157 of the Customs Act, 1969, punishable under clause 89 and 90 of Section 156 of the Customs Act, 1969 read with SRO 499(I)/2009 dated 13.06.2009. 2. Learned counsel submits that the applicant has been erroneously nominated in the FIR and challan submitted in the aforementioned case and is intent upon surrendering to the trial Court, however, in order to be enabled in such regard seeks to be admitted to protective bail. 3. In view of the foregoing, and without adverting to the merits of the case1, the applicant is admitted to protective bail from the date hereof till end of Court hours on 18.02.2026 or upon surrender of the applicant before the trial Court, whichever is earlier, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and a personal recognizance bond, in the like amount, to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. 4. This Special Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of accordingly.

In view of the foregoing, and without adverting to the merits of the case1, the applicant is admitted to protective bail from the date hereof till end of Court hours on 18.02.2026 or upon surrender of the applicant before the trial Court, whichever is earlier, subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousand Only) and a personal recognizance bond, in the like amount, to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. 4. This Special Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of accordingly. Judge Khuhro/PS 1 Mukhtar Awan vs. The State reported as 1990 PCrLJ 617; Sabir Hussain vs. The State reported as 1999 MLD 2208.
